name: aws-inspector
description: AWS Inspector v2 — vulnerability + network reachability findings for EC2/ECR/Lambda.
title: aws-inspector

llmHints.on_match: Inspector findings query observed. ECR image / EC2 / Lambda vulnerability findings captured.

positiveSetup: Invoke cilock with argv starting "aws inspector2"
negativeSetup: Invoke cilock with unrelated argv (e.g. `echo unrelated`)
